Package astrophage

Class Moving

java.lang.Object
astrophage.Moving

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int[]
    analyze(Astrophage astro, Cell[][] grid)
    Analizes the neighbouring cells of a given astrophage (including the one it's on) and returns the brightest one.
    static void
    deciding(Astrophage astro, Cell[][] grid, int[] bestPlace)
    Moves the given astrophage to the brightest neighbouring place on the board.
    static void
    move(Astrophage astro, Cell[][] grid, float movementCost)
    Moves the given astrophage, decreases it's energy and absorbs the light from the cell it moved to.

  • Constructor Details

    • Moving

      public Moving()

  • Method Details

    • analyze

      public static int[] analyze(Astrophage astro, Cell[][] grid)
      Analizes the neighbouring cells of a given astrophage (including the one it's on) and returns the brightest one.
      Parameters:
      astro - the given astrophage
      grid - the board the astrophage is on
      Returns:
      the coordinates of the brightest neighbouring cell

    • deciding

      public static void deciding(Astrophage astro, Cell[][] grid, int[] bestPlace)
      Moves the given astrophage to the brightest neighbouring place on the board. If the astrophage is already on the brightest place, moves it to a random neighbouring place instead.
      Parameters:
      astro - the moved astrophage
      grid - the board the astrophage is on
      bestPlace - the coordinates of the brightest neighbouring cell

    • move

      public static void move(Astrophage astro, Cell[][] grid, float movementCost)
      Moves the given astrophage, decreases it's energy and absorbs the light from the cell it moved to. If the move makes the astrophage's energy lesser or equal to 0, makes it not alive and it does not absorb the light.
      Parameters:
      astro - the given astrophage
      grid - the board the astrophage is on
      movementCost - the energy cont of the astrophage's movement
